overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy walking through a dark waterlogged cave tunnel and emerging onto a sunlit tropical beach with ancient ruins. She explores the coastline, walking through shallow ocean water as the camera follows in third-person perspective.

rough textured stone walls of the cave tunnel
shallow water covering the cave floor reflecting light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dark, narrow cave tunnel with water covering the ground. The character walks forward toward a bright archway exit, with rough stone walls visible on both sides.

lighting shifts from dark cave interior to bright natural sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character exits the cave into a bright tropical beach environment. A large rusted shipwreck dominates the right side while palm trees frame the scene. The lighting shifts dramatically from dark to bright natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach with ancient stone ruins

events.description: character turns left to follow the coastline path

agents.ego_description: walking along sandy beach, surveying ancient ruins and tropical vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to follow the coastline, walking through open beach terrain. Ancient stone ruins become visible on the left while the shipwreck recedes into the distance. Birds fly overhead in the partly cloudy sky.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the water's edge along the rocky coastline. She steps from the dry sand into the shallow clear water, with ancient ruins visible ahead across the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with submerged rocks

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow clear water along the rocky coastline, examining the submerged terrain

natural rock arch formation in the water

segments.scene_description: The character continues wading through the shallow coastal waters, with submerged rocks visible beneath the surface. The beach falls behind as she explores the rocky shoreline, with distant cliffs and rock formations visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive darkness of a waterlogged cave into the expansive brightness of a tropical coastline. It begins inside a narrow stone tunnel, following the character as she moves through shallow water toward a glowing archway. As she exits the cave, the lighting shifts dramatically to brilliant natural sunlight, revealing a landscape dominated by a massive rusted shipwreck and framing palm trees. The scene then opens up as the character turns left to follow the beach, passing ancient stone ruins under a partly cloudy sky with birds flying overhead. Finally, the camera tracks her as she steps from the dry sand into clear, shallow coastal waters, wading past submerged rocks toward distant cliffs and rock formations.
